smoke.detail: Box (rosenbluth) pixi.lock solved (linux-64, real conda-forge hashes). pixi run pytest tests/test_model_pains_brenk.py -m model -q => 4 passed. FTO-43 fixture returns the four fields {PAINS_hit,PAINS_count,BRENK_hit,BRENK_count} consistent (hit iff count>0, raw match-list length==count); catechol PAINS-hit (catechol_A), nitrobenzene BRENK-hit (nitro_group), ethane clean; output validates against core.schemas.OutputRecord.

note: PAINS(A/B/C union)+BRENK RDKit FilterCatalog rule; soft over-flagging filter (look-closer, fluorescence-assay relevance in README); box-solved lock + smoke ok.
